d:
Passive. Rhys can move while attacking but is unable to do so for [[8]]s if under control effects. ATK SPD and Haste won't affect his attack animation speed. Every 1 ATK SPD or Haste grants him [[2]] Crit DMG Boost.
Rhys fires at enemies within a arced radius, shooting 6 projectiles across the battlefield, each dealing [[280%]]<ATK> damage to enemies on its path. Rhys then loads his lance with Blast Ammo, allowing his normal attacks to deal [[180%]]<ATK> damage to the target and causing [[40%]]<ATK> splash damage to enemies in a 1-tile arc behind the target until he is affected by a control effect.
Increases the damage dealt by each projectile against enemies on its path to [[290%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt by each projectile against enemies on its path to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt by each projectile against enemies on its path to [[310%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt by each projectile against enemies on its path to [[320%]]<ATK>.

Passive. Rhys gains [[10]] Crit.
Active. Rhys gains control immunity when taking control effects.
Restores [[120%]]<ATK> HP upon casting this skill.
Increases the Passive Crit bonus to [[12]].
Increases the Passive Crit bonus to [[15]].
Rhys loads Shock Ammo to shoot enemies within [[2]]-tile, dealing [[220%]]<ATK> damage and knocking them back [[2]]-tile. He's unable to cast this skill when loaded with Blast Ammo.
Increases damage to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[250%]]<ATK>.
Rhys increase his Crit DMG Boost by [[22]] during battle. He gains an extra [[8]] Crit DMG Boost when his lance is loaded with Blast Ammo.
Rhys increase his Crit DMG Boost by [[30]] during battle. He gains an extra [[10]] Crit DMG Boost when his lance is loaded with Blast Ammo.
Rhys increase his Crit DMG Boost by [[38]] during battle. He gains an extra [[12]] Crit DMG Boost when his lance is loaded with Blast Ammo.
Rhys gains bonus movement speed when moving on the battlefield. He reaches the max speed [[5]]s into a battle and loads Blast Ammo.
Increases Blast Ammo damage to [[220%]]<ATK> and the splash damage to [[50%]]<ATK>. Increases the splash range to a 2-tile arc behind the target.
Increases Blast Ammo damage to [[230%]]<ATK> and the splash damage to [[55%]]<ATK>. Increases the splash range to a 2-tile arc behind the target.
Increases Blast Ammo damage to [[240%]]<ATK> and the splash damage to [[60%]]<ATK>. Increases the splash range to a 2-tile arc behind the target.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Life Drain, 13 Ranged DEF.

d: Reduces the cooldown of Defensive Stance to [[3]]s.

Rhys' Ultimate now stops time until he finishes firing all bullets. If cast while Blast Ammo is loaded, he increases his Crit DMG Boost by [[120]] and movement speed by [[60%]], lasting until he's affected by a control effect.
